exercises.title: Inspect a Running Container
exercises.description: Use docker inspect to find namespaces, cgroup paths, and mounted volumes.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can identify runtime isolation and filesystem settings.

exercises.title: Enter a Network Namespace
exercises.description: Join a container network namespace from the host and observe its interfaces.
exercises.expected_outcome: You see the container network stack from the host.

exercises.title: Write a Multi-Stage Dockerfile
exercises.description: Build a small Go or Python app in one stage and copy the runtime artifact into a tiny final image.
exercises.expected_outcome: The final image is much smaller than the build image.

exercises.title: Run a Container Manually
exercises.description: Use unshare and chroot to create a lightweight isolated process tree.
exercises.expected_outcome: You get a shell in a manually isolated environment.

exercises.title: Build a Minimal Runtime
exercises.description: Create a small shell-based runtime that sets up namespaces and launches a process with basic isolation.
exercises.expected_outcome: A process starts inside your own container-like environment.

exercises.title: Compose a 3-Tier App
exercises.description: Stand up nginx, an app service, and PostgreSQL with health checks and networking.
exercises.expected_outcome: All services come up and can talk to one another.
